subcodes.first_line: May my spirit be a sacrifice unto Your presence! That which that Beloved One sent hath been laid before the Most Holy, Most Exalted Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لحضرتکم الفداء آنچه آن محبوب ارسال فرمودند در ساحت امنع اقدس عرض شد
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @presence of; reunion with God, @wisdom [hikmat], @rejection, opposition and persecution
